selected_title: Centralization and Decentralization are Two Important Issues in the State-owned Enterprise's Reform
question: Where does “Centralization and Decentralization are Two Important Issues in the State-owned Enterprise's Reform” support or contradict the causal account advanced by “DECENTRALIZATION OF NATIONAL ECONOMY MANAGEMENT: THE EXPERIENCE OF EUROPEAN COUNTRIES”?

evidence_spans.text: Centralization and decentralization are two important contents to construct the controlling power structure in state-owned enterprises and they deal with the total benefits of an enterprise and the benefis of the managers. After review of the reform in state-owned enterprises, gain and loss of centralization and decentralization are analyzed. The relationship between enterprise centralization and decentralization is discussed using a practical case. It is explained that either decentralization without limitation or over-centralization is acceptable. Basis and standards to deal with the relationship of centralization and decentralization are presented.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Decentralization, Economic system through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 88 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
